CONTENT.Honours: Legia WarsawEkstraklasa: 2019–20IndividualEkstraklasa Young Player of the Month: August 2020, September 2021
CONTENT.Club career: On 13 March 2019, he made his official debut for Legia against Raków Częstochowa, coming on at the 110th minute for Michał Kucharczyk in the Polish Cup fixture. On 21 July 2019, he made his Ekstraklasa debut against Pogoń Szczecin.On 7 July 2020, it was announced that Śląsk Wrocław had signed Praszelik on a four-year deal.On 29 January 2022, Praszelik joined Serie A side Hellas Verona on loan until 31 January 2023, with an option to buy and a conditional obligation to buy.On 26 January 2023, Praszelik was loaned by Verona to Cosenza in Serie B. On 10 August 2023, he re-joined the second division club on a season-long loan.On 5 August 2024, he was sent on another season-long loan to a second-tier club, this time joining Südtirol.

SUMMARY: Mateusz Praszelik (born 26 September 2000) is a Polish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie B club Südtirol, on loan from Hellas Verona.
